project_type: C# network IDS daemon, originally targeting .NET Framework 3.5/Mono, previously bumped to 4.8 in working tree. Three projects in one solution.
build_system: MSBuild via old-style .csproj files. Migrating to SDK-style .csproj targeting net8.0.
test_framework: None - no test projects exist in the solution.
verification_instructions: Cannot run dotnet build/restore under INTEGRATIONS_ONLY. Validate XML structure of .csproj files and C# syntax correctness by inspection.
setup_instructions: N/A - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode, cannot install .NET SDK or restore packages.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. Cannot run dotnet restore, dotnet build, or any package downloads. All changes must be validated structurally (well-formed XML, correct C# syntax).
key_patterns: Old-style verbose .csproj with explicit Compile includes and DLL HintPath references. Mono.Options (vendored in Options.cs) for CLI parsing. Mono.Posix/Mono.Unix for Unix signals and current directory. MySql.Data.MySqlClient for database. SharpPcap/PacketDotNet for packet capture with deprecated GetEncapsulated() API.
directory_structure: src/wiresentry/ contains the C# solution with 3 projects: WireSentry (main exe), WireSentry.SDK (class library), WireSentry.Scanners.Common (class library). src/wiresentry-web/ is a Rails app (already updated, out of scope).
